prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业热度近年呈分化观望态势；计算机类、电子信息/通信持续高热推荐；广东省2026年物理类考生约45.6万人，较2025年增加约1.58万人（+3.6%），竞争略有加剧；北京师范大学（珠海校区）位于广东省珠海市，属于本省招生，对本省考生有天然地域偏好优势；该校在广东招生规模较大（物理类345人），本地招生占比高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次约13873名、2026年扩招约12.7%对位次的下拉作用、以及广东省物理类考生增加约3.6%对竞争的加剧作用，扩招幅度大于考生增幅，整体竞争略有缓解但位次仍有所后移；预测2026年物理类最低位次约15000名，区间14500–15500名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2025, the minimum ranking for the Physics Category is approximately 13873, which is the only complete admission data available in recent years; the university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Guangdong Province for the Physics Category, with a baseline ranking of about 13873 in 2025; the provincial plan for the Physics Category: 306 students in 2025, 345 students in 2026, an expansion of about 12.7%, significantly increasing enrollment quotas, theoretically easing competition slightly, but the large expansion has a downward pull on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 19th (Beijing Normal University main campus), stable at 19th in recent years, belonging to the top normal universities in China; the reputation evaluation in 2026 is neutral/mixed, mainly involving university management public opinion, with no obvious negative events; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (total ranking 37th), short video exposure is at an upper-middle level, reflecting moderate application attention; historical abnormal admission signals only in 2022 in Jiangxi, with limited impact on Guangdong; Education A+, Psychology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Chinese History A+, Geography A+, Marxist Theory A+, Mathematics A, Statistics A, etc., and the majors offered at the Zhuhai campus, such as Mathematics and Science Experimental Class, are highly correlated with advantageous disciplines like Mathematics, Geography, and Psychology.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of normal/education majors has shown a differentiated wait-and-see trend in recent years; Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication continue to be highly recommended; in 2026, there are approximately 456,000 Physics Category candidates in Guangdong Province, an increase of about 15,800 (+3.6%) compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition; Beijing Normal University (Zhuhai Campus) is located in Zhuhai City, Guangdong Province, and recruits within the province, giving it a natural regional preference advantage for local candidates; the university has a large enrollment scale in Guangdong (345 students in the Physics Category), with a high proportion of local enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of about 13873, the downward pull on rankings from the approximately 12.7% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the intensification of competition from the approximately 3.6% increase in Physics Category candidates in Guangdong Province, the expansion rate is greater than the candidate growth rate, so overall competition is slightly eased but rankings still shift backward; the predicted minimum ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 is about 15000, with a range of 14500–15500.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Zhuhai Campus) (including Economics <Data Science>, Financial Technology)
- Mathematics Class (Zhuhai Campus) (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Physics, Systems Science and Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Applied Statistics, Artificial Intelligence <Innovation Experimental Class>).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Science Experimental Class (Zhuhai Campus) (including Geography, Psychology, Biological Sciences, Chemistry).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- No other Physics Category admission majors currently.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 14500–15500, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Science Experimental Class as the main choice, with Tier 1 Social Science Experimental Class and Mathematics Class as reach options; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<14500), prioritize reaching for Mathematics Class (including AI direction); if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>15500), it is recommended to use Science Experimental Class as a safety choice.
